legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Poland / Polska. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Poland / Polska. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Poland}} Since 2011, prosecutors can choose not to prosecute possession of small quantities of cannabis for personal use if it is a first offense or if the person is drug dependent.<ref>{{cite web|title=Poland Approves Drug Decriminalization – Sort Of|url=http://stopthedrugwar.org/chronicle/2011/jun/08/poland_approves_drug_decriminali|website=stopthedrugwar.org|access-date=26 April 2016|archive-date=18 August 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180818111434/https://stopthedrugwar.org/chronicle/2011/jun/08/poland_approves_drug_decriminali|url-status=live}}</ref> Possession of large quantities of drugs can result in up to 10 years in prison.<ref>{{citation |url = http://fakty.interia.pl/fakty_dnia/news/narkotyki-w-malych-ilosciach-i-na-wlasny-uzytek-odstapienie,1644751 |title = Drugs in small quantity and for personal use with no punishment – Poland |publisher = Interia.pl |date = 26 May 2011 |access-date = 29 May 2011 |url-status = dead |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20110529134753/http://fakty.interia.pl/fakty_dnia/news/narkotyki-w-malych-ilosciach-i-na-wlasny-uzytek-odstapienie,1644751 |archive-date = 29 May 2011}}</ref>
